task: Write a PRD for an in-app notification system. Users currently miss important updates.
expect: Includes a clear problem statement grounded in user impact
Frames the need using JTBD (Jobs-to-be-Done) or similar user-centric lens
Defines success metrics (e.g. notification open rate, time-to-action)
Scopes the feature with explicit in/out boundaries
Lists acceptance criteria for key functionality

task: We have 15 feature requests from customers, 5 internal ideas, and 3 tech debt items. Create a prioritised Q3 roadmap.
expect: Uses RICE, ICE, or similar prioritisation framework with visible scoring
Shows the scoring or ranking for each item
Groups items into themes or strategic pillars
Includes rationale for the top 3 priorities and what was deprioritised

task: Our biggest customer wants a custom feature that conflicts with our product vision. How do we handle this?
expect: Analyses revenue impact vs strategic cost of the custom feature
Includes a communication strategy for the customer
Provides a decision framework for evaluating similar requests in the future
